tags.name: `mc-button-group`
tags.description:
A customizable button group component that combines individual buttons into a cohesive group.
Category: Forms, Content Display
Purpose: Combines individual buttons that have a logical relationship into a cohesive group.
When to use: Related actions, Toggle options, Navigation between views
When not to use: Single actions, Non-related buttons
Works with components: mc-button-group-item
Alternative component names: Button Set, Action Group, Toggle Group

Events:

  * `listchange` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when a button group item is interacted.

  * `listitemsloaded` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when the button group items are loaded.

  * `focuschange` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when a button group item receives focus.

  * `scroll` {`Event`} - Dispatched when the button group is scrolled.

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot where the button group items go.

Attributes:

  * `selectiontype` {`ListTypes`} - The selection type, can be set to none, single, multiple.

  * `variant` - The variant of the button group and all items in the group. Possible values are 'bordered', 'borderless', and 'rounded'.

  * `selectedappearance` {`"primary" | "neutral"`} - The appearance of selected buttons in the button group. Possible values are 'primary' and 'neutral'.

Properties:

  * `slottedElements` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `buttonGroupItems` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `width` {`string`} - 

  * `disablecircularkeynav` {`boolean`} - 

  * `keynavigationtype` {`string`} - 

  * `disablehandlemousemove` {`boolean`} - 

  * `scrollToSelectedValue` {`boolean`} - 

  * `orientation` {`string`} - 

  * `selectiontype` {`ListTypes`} - The selection type, can be set to none, single, multiple.

  * `variant` - The variant of the button group and all items in the group. Possible values are 'bordered', 'borderless', and 'rounded'.

  * `selectedappearance` {`"primary" | "neutral"`} - The appearance of selected buttons in the button group. Possible values are 'primary' and 'neutral'.

attributes.name: selectiontype
attributes.description:
`selectiontype` {`ListTypes`} - The selection type, can be set to none, single, multiple.

Property: selectiontype

Default: none

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description:
`variant` - The variant of the button group and all items in the group. Possible values are 'bordered', 'borderless', and 'rounded'.

Property: variant

Default: bordered

attributes.name: selectedappearance
attributes.description:
`selectedappearance` {`"primary" | "neutral"`} - The appearance of selected buttons in the button group. Possible values are 'primary' and 'neutral'.

Property: selectedappearance

Default: primary

attributes.name: onlistchange
attributes.description: `listchange` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when a button group item is interacted.

attributes.name: onlistitemsloaded
attributes.description: `listitemsloaded` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when the button group items are loaded.

attributes.name: onfocuschange
attributes.description: `focuschange` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when a button group item receives focus.

attributes.name: onscroll
attributes.description: `scroll` {`Event`} - Dispatched when the button group is scrolled.
